mechanics.excerpt: Currently ruled by the Humphreys family; descendants of those who helped forge the Free Worlds League the planet is known throughout the League for its beautiful botanical gardens which stretch north of the capital city of Jojoken; The gardens beauty belies the planet 's tumultuous history: and neighboring worilds seceded from the League 3030 and joined the Magistracy of Canopus in war against the Capellan Confederation: decade -long struggle ensued before Andurien and its sister worlds were finally paci: fied and restored to the Free Worlds League Luthien The Combine capital world heavily industrialized, Its Iand: scape dominated by ugly sprawling cities: Much 0t Its air and water is contaminated, earning the nickname ~Black Luthien.
